name: IdsEdwClmLnHlthCstGrpFExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH CTE_db AS ( SELECT CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.CLM_ID, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CD2.TRGT_CD AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, CD1.TRGT_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.CLM_LN_SK, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.MR_CASE_ADM_CT, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.MR_PROC_CT, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.CASE_ADM_ID, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.MR_LN_ID, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.MR_LN_CASE_ID, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.MR_LN_DTL_ID, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.FCLTY_CASE_ID, CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP AS CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD1 ON CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK AND CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSK} INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG AS CD2 ON CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK WHERE CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtractRunCycle} ), CTE_Src AS ( SELECT CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLM_LN_SK, MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, MR_CASE_ADM_CT, MR_PROC_CT, MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, CASE_ADM_ID, MR_LN_ID, MR_LN_CASE_ID, MR_LN_DTL_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, FCLTY_CASE_ID, VRSN_ID FROM CTE_db WHERE CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK <> 1 AND CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK <> 0 ), CTE_na AS ( SELECT 1 AS CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, 'NA' AS CLM_ID, 0 AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 'NA' AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 1 AS CLM_LN_SK, 1 AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, 0 AS MR_CASE_ADM_CT, 0 AS MR_PROC_CT, 0 AS MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, 'NA' AS CASE_ADM_ID, 'NA' AS MR_LN_ID, 'NA' AS MR_LN_CASE_ID, 'NA' AS MR_LN_DTL_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'NA' AS FCLTY_CASE_ID, 'NA' AS VRSN_ID ), CTE_unk AS ( SELECT 0 AS CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, 'UNK' AS CLM_ID, 0 AS CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, 'UNK' AS CLM_SRC_SYS_CD, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 0 AS CLM_LN_SK, 0 AS MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, 0 AS MR_CASE_ADM_CT, 0 AS MR_PROC_CT, 0 AS MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, 'UNK' AS CASE_ADM_ID, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_ID, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_CASE_ID, 'UNK' AS MR_LN_DTL_ID, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 100 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 'UNK' AS FCLTY_CASE_ID, 'UNK' AS VRSN_ID ) SELECT * FROM CTE_na UNION ALL SELECT * FROM CTE_unk UNION ALL SELECT * FROM CTE_Src
